value.body:
## Context

Agent runs need operator controls that map cleanly to task states and preserve auditability.

## Outcome

Users can safely cancel, retry, resume, and answer waiting agent runs from the dashboard and ticket detail.

## Acceptance criteria

- Controls are only enabled for valid task states.
- Cancel and retry require clear confirmation when work may be lost or repeated.
- Waiting-for-input prompts support plain text input and append it through the existing task input endpoint.
- State transitions are visible in task events and ticket activity.
- Tests cover state gating and mutation failure recovery.

frontmatter.title: Add cancel, retry, resume, and waiting-for-input controls for agent runs

value.title: Add cancel, retry, resume, and waiting-for-input controls for agent runs
